svg.text: Per prompt j in a round, the pool holds candidates k = 1…nj with value scores xjk in [0,1] and judge scores sjk; the judge keeps two candidates.
J = the round's prompts, equal weight each.
D = prompts where ρⱼ is defined (fewer than two candidates,
or zero variance on either side, drop the prompt).
mean value of the 2 kept candidates
mean value of the whole candidate pool
Symbols — every quantity in the measurements

text.tspan: — value score of prompt j, candidate k
— judge score of prompt j, candidate k
— kept mean (mean value of the 2 kept)
— pool mean (mean value of the whole pool)
